ddls:
CREATE TABLE "component_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being tested */,
  "vgdc_voltage" REAL /* DC voltage applied to the component */,
  "vgac_voltage" REAL /* AC voltage applied to the gate */,
  "vsac_voltage" REAL /* AC voltage applied to the source */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the applied voltage */,
  "current" REAL /* Current flowing through the component */,
  "power" REAL /* Power consumed by the component */,
  "direction_of_current" INTEGER /* Direction of the current flow (1 for forward, 0 for reverse) */,
  "test_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was conducted */,
  "test_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test station where the test was conducted */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the test (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "calibration_info" TEXT /* Calibration information for the test equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tests_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tests_test_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_station_id") REFERENCES test_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the component (e.g., operating voltage range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the manufacturer (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the test station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test station */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the station */,
  "equipment_info" TEXT /* Information about the equipment used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_stations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "training_info" TEXT /* Training and certification information for the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test schedule */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component to be tested */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test station where the test will be conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time for the test */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time for the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test to be conducted (e.g., functional, endurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES test_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an anomaly was detected during the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed, inconclusive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES component_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result where the anomaly was detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact analysis */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anomaly */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the anomaly */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to mitigate the anomaly */,
  "mitigation_plan" TEXT /* Plan for implementing the recommended action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_impacts_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., preventive, corrective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES test_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was prepared */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who prepared the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., test result, anomaly analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES component_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report distribution */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was distributed */,
  "method_of_distribution" TEXT /* Method of distribution (e.g., email, print) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_distribution_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_distribution_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recipient (e.g., quality manager, product engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was made */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_access_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)
